summary: Frontend-only re-test of Revtitude landing page. Previous document.title bug is FIXED. All required data-testids present, all 5 testimonials (unique) present, all CTAs correctly link to Calendly with target='_blank', nav scroll works, mobile toggle opens mobile menu, zero console errors.

test_results.title_at_load: Revtitude — Your GTM isn't broken. Your system is.
test_results.title_at_1200ms: Revtitude — Your GTM isn't broken. Your system is.

critical_code_review_comments: document.title fix via useEffect + 500ms re-assert works as intended against injected scripts.
Marquee duplicates testimonial-cards (count=2 per id). If strict unique-element matching is needed downstream, consider mirror cards with aria-hidden and testids only on the originals.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Title bug fixed. All data-testids, CTAs (Calendly + _blank), nav scroll, mobile menu verified on https://revenue-engine-154.preview.emergentagent.com. Marquee duplicates testimonial-card-0..4 (count=2 each) but 5 unique IDs present — acceptable per request.
